context: The response should exercise the `intent` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: elicits_understanding
checklist.description: Elicits or clarifies goal, scope, constraints, and success criteria from the human.

checklist.name: uses_project_context
checklist.description: Reads project expert/context or performs bootstrap discovery when no expert exists.

checklist.name: writes_prd
checklist.description: Produces a PRD under prds/<feature>/prd.md with clear scope and out-of-scope sections.

checklist.name: writes_runnable_done
checklist.description: Produces an executable run-prd-test.sh or equivalent runnable definition of done.

checklist.name: uses_prd_branch
checklist.description: Uses the expected PRD branch/artifact handoff shape for the harness.
